build: make serve, make migrate, make test, make test-integration
conventions: Repository pattern, Service layer, Echo handlers, testify/mock and testify/assert for tests, slog for logging
notes: Email Service Integration: EmailService injected into AuthService and OrganizationService; welcome/password-reset/org-invitation emails queued asynchronously (fire-and-forget); templates in templates/emails/; permissions added to DefaultPermissions() in main.go
structure: internal/service/email.go for EmailService, internal/service/auth.go updated with EmailService field, internal/service/organization.go updated with EmailService field, templates/emails/ for HTML/text templates
techStack: Go 1.22, Echo v4, GORM, PostgreSQL, Redis, testcontainers
